pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 6, 25: TASK_DIR set to /home/ga/Fiji_Data/curation, image saved to $TASK_DIR/training_image.tif
setup_task.sh line 84: Fiji macro saves ROIs to $TASK_DIR/automated_segmentation.zip
export_result.sh line 5: OUTPUT_ZIP=$TASK_DIR/curated_ground_truth.zip, task.json description confirms expected output path

setup_task.sh line 51: makeOval(5, 5, 20, 20) creates oval from (5,5) with dimensions 20×20, center at (5+20/2, 5+20/2) = (15, 15). Confirmed in ground truth info at line 115: "noise_coords": [15, 15]
setup_task.sh line 118: Ground truth info hardcodes "merge_radius": 50. Verifier.py line 97 loads this value with default fallback of 60 if missing, but actual setup saves 50.

pi_items.verified_value: BBBC005 dataset (Broad Bioimage Benchmark Collection). Image downloaded from https://data.broadinstitute.org/bbbc/BBBC005/BBBC005_v1_images/SIMCEP_images_A05_C26_F1_s05_w1.TIF or copied from /opt/fiji_samples/BBBC005.
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 15-26: Source image can come from local BBBC005 samples or downloaded from Broad Institute server. BBBC005 is a real, publicly available dataset of synthetic fluorescence microscopy images.

pi_items.verified_value: ROIs are synthetically generated by Fiji ImageJ macro with intentional errors: (1) False positive noise oval at (15,15), (2) Merged cell created by combining two cells.
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 40-84: Macro uses Auto Threshold (Otsu method) and Analyze Particles to create base segmentation, then adds intentional errors.

privileged_info_summary: The roi_segmentation_curation@1 task uses an image from BBBC005 (SIMCEP_images_A05_C26_F1_s05_w1), a real publicly available dataset of synthetic fluorescence microscopy images from the Broad Institute. The ROI data is synthetically generated with intentional segmentation errors: a false positive noise ROI at pixel location (15, 15) and a merged cell error that requires splitting into two separate ROIs. The merge search radius for verification is 50 pixels. Output files are stored at ~/Fiji_Data/curation/. All file paths, error locations, and search radii match the metadata claims.
